title: Rösti
excerpt: Ingredients 3 potatoes finely grated 1 egg lightly beaten 10 ml flour 2,5 ml baking powder salt and pepper to taste half an onion finely grated 2 spring onions finely chopped sour cream and biltong for serving Method Squeeze all the water out of the grated potato and spring onions. Mix in the rest of the ingredients. …
html:
Ingredients

  • 3 potatoes finely grated
  • 1 egg lightly beaten
  • 10 ml flour
  • 2,5 ml baking powder
  • salt and pepper to taste
  • half an onion finely grated
  • 2 spring onions finely chopped
  • sour cream and biltong for serving

Method

Squeeze all the water out of the grated potato and spring onions.

Mix in the rest of the ingredients.

Fry in shallow oil for 8 minutes on each side.

Drain on paper towel.

Serve with sour cream and biltong.

Easy!
